game_meta.name: Apex Legends
game_meta.tagline: 3-stack BR — 20 squads, drop pick, looting, rotating zones, endgame circle.

sides.attack: Pushing / contesting other squads, taking POIs
sides.defense: Holding loot / endgame zone, third-party setups

game_meta.round_economy: Loot-based — tier-1/2/3 weapons, attachments, helmets, body armor. No buy phases.
game_meta.round_format: BR — 20 squads, 1 winner. Ring closes over ~25 minutes. Top-3 = ranked LP.
key_mechanics: Legend abilities: passive (always on), tactical (cooldown), ultimate (charges over time + healing accelerates)
Armor system: white (50) → blue (75) → purple (100) → red (Evo full charge)
Healing: syringes (25 HP, 5s), med kits (full HP, 8s), shield cells (25 shield, 3s), shield batteries (full shield, 5s)
Movement: slide-jump for speed, wall-bounce for vertical, super-glide for advanced repositioning
Recoil: each weapon has unique pattern, gold attachments reduce recoil, sniper requires lead
Squad comp: 3-stack ideal — 1 entry, 1 anchor, 1 support
Ring damage: ring 1-2 = 2 HP/tick, ring 3+ scales up to 25 HP/tick — staying out = death
Knockdown system: down → revive (5s) → respawn (60s at beacon)

sites.name: Storm Catcher
sites.drop_priority: Hot drop — top tier-3 loot in Center Tower
sites.rotation_routes: Gravity Cannon to next ring, Trident to coast for safe rotation

sites.name: Antenna
sites.drop_priority: Tier-2 loot, less contested than Storm Catcher
sites.rotation_routes: Gravity Cannon for fast rotation; Tower top for vertical

sites.name: Lightning Rod
sites.rotation_routes: Cliffside for safe rotation, Rod Top for high-ground

sites.name: Fish Farms
sites.rotation_routes: Water rotation viable, Inland for ring closer

sites.name: Cascade Falls
sites.rotation_routes: Cave for safe rotate, Waterfall for vertical

sites.name: Highpoint
sites.rotation_routes: Peak top for vertical, Cave for safe rotate

sites.name: Fragment East
sites.rotation_routes: Streets for ground, Tower for vertical

sites.name: Fragment West
sites.rotation_routes: Streets for ground, Tower for vertical

sites.name: Skull Town
sites.drop_priority: Tier-3 — iconic hot drop, very contested

sites.name: Capacitor
sites.drop_priority: Tier-2 — mid-game POI with moving walls

sites.name: Artillery
sites.drop_priority: Tier-3 hot drop — supply bin loot is iconic

common_mistakes: Jump Pad in obvious spots (gets shot mid-air)
Octane.ideal_use: Stim for fast rotates, Jump Pad for vertical engages + team rotation

kit.passive: Voices from the Void — warning on being aimed at
kit.tactical: Into the Void — phase shift, invuln for 4s

Wraith.ideal_use: Void for save + rotate, Rift for team flank, Voices for ambush warning

kit.passive: Insider Knowledge — scan beacon for ring info
kit.tactical: Grappling Hook — grapple to surface, 15s CD

Pathfinder.ideal_use: Grapple for vertical, Zipline for team commit, Beacon scan for ring info

kit.passive: Spacewalk — slow fall, drift while in air
kit.tactical: Gravity Lift — vertical lift for team
kit.ult: Black Hole — area gravity, pulls enemies in

common_mistakes: No coordination on Black Hole + Frag
Horizon.ideal_use: Lift for vertical engages, Black Hole + Grenade chain for team cap

common_mistakes: Skyward Dive in middle of fight (mid-air vulnerable)
Jets for repositioning when low HP
Valkyrie.ideal_use: Jets for vertical engages, Missile Swarm for cap deny, Skyward Dive for team rotation

kit.passive: Marked for Death — scan dead enemies for kills
kit.tactical: Arc Snare — placeable trap that snares enemies
kit.ult: Phase Breach — team teleport 50m + drag enemy

Ash.ideal_use: Snare for area denial, Phase Breach for team flank commit, Marked for Death for intel

kit.passive: Phase Walker — quick mobility through walls

Alter.ideal_use: Phase for fast rotates, Echo for misdirection, Vertical escape for save

kit.tactical: Eye of the Allfather — scan area for enemies
kit.ult: Beast of the Hunt — speed + see enemy heat signatures

common_mistakes: Scan during fight (no info while shooting)
Bloodhound.ideal_use: Scan before push, Beast for team commit, Footprint for chase / flee

kit.ult: Drone EMP — disable shields + slow enemies

Crypto.ideal_use: Drone for site intel, EMP for cap commit (shields broken), Neurolink for shared intel

kit.tactical: Focus of Attention — single-target reveal + interrupt

Seer.ideal_use: Focus on enemy commit, Exhibit for team reveal, Heart Seeker for stealth

kit.tactical: Echo Relocation — recall Echo, teleport to her
kit.ult: Sniper's Mark — auto-locked sniper rifle, marks targets

Vantage.ideal_use: High-ground sniper, Echo for vertical mobility, Sniper's Mark for cluster damage + reveal

common_mistakes: Care Package in random spot (no rotation)
Lifeline.ideal_use: Drone for fight sustain, Care Package for loot upgrade, Combat Revive for save

kit.passive: Gun Shield — passive shield while ADS

Gibraltar.ideal_use: Dome for revive cycle, Bombardment for team cap commit, Gun Shield for mid-range trades

kit.passive: Eye for Quality — see nearby loot

common_mistakes: No coordination on Market for team
Loba.ideal_use: Teleport for repositioning, Market for team heal cycle, Loot intel for rotation

kit.passive: Retrieve the Wounded — drag downed teammate while reviving

Newcastle.ideal_use: Mobile Shield for revive cycle, Castle Wall for team cap commit, Retrieve for save

Conduit.ideal_use: Radiant Transfer for sustain, Energy Barricade for area denial, Passive for resilience

kit.passive: Spark of Genius — Ult Accelerants charge ult fully
kit.ult: Interception Pylon — destroys grenades + restores shields

Wattson.ideal_use: Fence entries for site hold, Pylon for shield regen, Spark for ult chain

kit.passive: Nox Vision — see enemies through own gas
kit.tactical: Nox Gas Trap — placeable gas trap
kit.ult: Nox Gas Grenade — throwable gas grenade

Caustic.ideal_use: Trap entries for site hold, Grenade for area denial, Nox Vision for through-smoke kills

Catalyst.ideal_use: Spikes for entry slow, Veil for team cap commit, Barricade for door hold

Rampart.ideal_use: Walls for entry cover, Sheila for sustained shred, Mods for mag advantage

kit.passive: Double Time — speed boost when shot at

Bangalore.ideal_use: Smoke for cover, Rolling Thunder for cap commit, Double Time for escape

Fuse.ideal_use: Knuckle Cluster for cap denial, Motherlode for area lock, Grenade overstack for damage

Revenant.ideal_use: Silence for cap commit, Forged Shadows for tank engage, Climb for high-ground

kit.passive: Warlord's Ire — see low HP enemies through walls
kit.ult: Wrecking Ball — sphere that pushes through obstacles

Mad Maggie.ideal_use: Riot Drill for cap deny, Wrecking Ball for cluster flush, Warlord's Ire for chase intel

Ballistic.ideal_use: Sling for loadout depth, Whistler for chip damage, Tempest for team gold upgrade

bronze: Hot dropping every game (low survival rate)
No ring damage awareness — dying on edge
No comms — full game in silence
silver: Ult tracking missing (no idea who has ult)
Solo fight engagements without team trade
No legend swap to counter enemy comp
Rotation timing — too late = dying on ring
Buying rifle / sniper for wrong range
gold: Ult save vs use decision wrong
platinum: Buy / loot decision based on round count
diamond: Pro-tier reads on enemy comp — but predictable on own
Ult discipline gaps — 1 wasted ult per round
Legend swap timing — too early or too late
Tank ult vs DPS ult priority confusion
master_pred: Pro-tier comp reads on every round (predictable)
Ult tracking gaps — 1 ult untracked per round
Comp staying static vs counter swap

positioning: Is the player in a trade position with squad (within 10m)?
Is the player exposed to multiple sightlines simultaneously?
Is the team holding high ground or low ground?
Is the team on the correct side of the ring (closer to next zone)?
Is the player using cover (rock, tree, building) or in open?
Did the player commit to a rotation or stay in a contested zone?
crosshair: Is the crosshair pre-aimed at head level on the angle?
Is the player tracking on hitscan or projectile leading on sniper?
Is the player using the right weapon class for the engagement range?
Is the recoil pattern being pulled correctly?
Is the player using ADS for mid-range or hipfire for close?
Is the player landing 1-tap headshots or sustained damage?
utility: Did the player use legend tactical proactively or reactively?
Did the player save ult for the team commit?
Was the legend role utility shared (Lifeline drone, Gibraltar dome)?
Did the player track enemy legend cooldowns?
Did the player use ult at the right round (endgame vs mid-game)?
Was the team coordinated on ult use?
decisions: Did the player drop the right POI (hot vs safe)?
Did the team commit to the fight or rotate?
Did the player engage 1v2+ without team backup?
Did the player save weapon on knock (correct vs full save)?
Did the player commit to the team push or split engagement?
Did the player track ring damage and rotate in time?
Did the player choose to third-party or hold position?

vocabulary: Hot drop: POI where 3+ squads land at start.
Edge drop: POI on map edge with fewer contesters.
Tier-1/2/3 loot: Loot quality tiers — tier-3 is best (purple/gold attachments).
Evo: Evo Shield system — armor that levels up with damage dealt.
Red armor: Fully evolved armor (max tier).
Knock: Knocked down, can be revived; 200 HP shield until full bleed-out.
Bleed-out: Final HP timer after knock, ~60s.
Respawn: 60s at respawn beacon after death (banner pickup needed).
Beacon: Survey beacon scanning for ring info, or respawn beacon for revival.
Banner: Dead teammate's player banner, picked up to respawn.
Third-party: Squad pushing into existing fight, often dominant.
Anti-third-party: Pre-positioning for the inevitable third squad.
Rotation / Rotate: Moving from current position to next ring zone.
Ring: Storm/zone closing in over time.
Ring damage: HP loss per tick when outside ring.
Endgame / Zone: Final ring with 2-3 squads remaining.
Top-3: Final 3 squads — ranked LP bonus.
Top-1: Champion squad — win the BR.
Squad wipe: Killing all 3 enemies in a squad.
Team flank: Coordinated rotate behind enemy.
Solo flank: 1 player rotates alone.
Anchor: Squad holding fixed position.
Skirmisher: Mobility-focused legend (Octane, Wraith, Path).
Recon: Information legend (Bloodhound, Crypto, Seer, Vantage).
Support: Heal/utility legend (Lifeline, Gibraltar, Loba, Newcastle).
Controller: Area denial legend (Wattson, Caustic, Catalyst).
Assault: Aggressive damage legend (Bangalore, Fuse, Revenant).
Tactical / Tac: Legend's tactical ability (cooldown).
Ult / Ultimate: Legend's ultimate ability (charges over time).
Passive: Legend's always-on ability.
Slide-jump: Slide + jump for speed.
Wall-bounce: Jump off wall for vertical/horizontal momentum.
Super-glide: Advanced slide-jump for max speed.
Tap-strafe: Macro/keyboard movement for fast direction change (some platforms).
Crouch-spam: Rapid crouch toggling for evasion.
Healing: Syringe (25 HP), Med Kit (full HP), Shield Cell (25 shield), Battery (full shield).
ADS: Aim Down Sights for accuracy.
Hipfire: No-scope shooting for close range.
Recoil pattern: Each weapon has unique pattern.
Hop-up: Special attachment for unique weapon perks.
Mag: Magazine attachment.
Stock: Reduces ADS / draw time.
Bolt: Sniper reload speed.
Care Package: Lifeline ult drops, or supply drop for high-tier loot.
Loot Tick / Crate: Inanimate loot container.
Death Box: Loot from killed enemies.
